name: awesome-ascend-skills
description: A comprehensive knowledge base for Huawei Ascend NPU development, structured as distributed AI Agent Skills. Includes environment setup, CANN installation, NPU commands, testing, inference deployment (vLLM, MindIE, SGLang), training frameworks (MindSpeed, MindSpore, VERL), and custom operators (AscendC, Triton, TileLang, CATLass).

plugins.name: ascend-npu
plugins.description: Huawei Ascend NPU complete knowledge base entry point. Use as the starting point for all Ascend NPU related tasks including environment setup, CANN installation, testing, AI model development, inference deployment, training, and operator development.

plugins.name: ascend-basic-env
plugins.description: Huawei Ascend NPU basic environment master skill. Use for environment setup, system preparation, and foundational configuration before development. Routes to specialized sub-skills for CANN installation, NPU commands reference, environment diagnostics, and testing.

plugins.name: ascend-dev
plugins.description: Huawei Ascend NPU development master skill. Use for AI model development, inference deployment, training, and operator development. Routes to framework-specific sub-skills.

plugins.name: ascend-use-cases
plugins.description: Ascend NPU real-world use cases and examples. Use for practical implementation examples and best practices for operators, inference, and training.

plugins.name: ascend-utils
plugins.description: Shared utilities and tools for Ascend NPU skills. Contains common scripts, environment checks, and helper tools used across all Ascend skills.
